message:
[bd-dd6s] Fix glamour table rendering width calculation

- Fixed tables ignoring word_wrap configuration in Renderer
- Fixed separator width calculation to handle dynamic separator lengths
- Added regression test test_table_respects_word_wrap
- Consolidated duplicate definitions in lipgloss/src/theme.rs
